title: Today
tagline: The private iPhone companion I use for weight, workouts, and the day's plan
summary: I wanted morning weight and gym tracking to take a few taps, not another spreadsheet. Today combines a simple daily plan, fast set logging, strength history, and useful progress views.
outcome: Today now works offline, saves protected local backups, writes weight to HealthKit, and sends an end-to-end encrypted snapshot into my private coaching system.
role: Designed and built the native iPhone app and its secure sync
proofPoints: Fast set logging with remembered loads, detailed muscle mapping, and flexible workout splits
Local-first storage, HealthKit weight writes, Keychain secrets, and AES-256-GCM sync
31 native tests covering workout, weight, recovery, and persistence behavior
